message:
feat: performance integration test suite — 37 tests (wa-3cyp.2)

Integration tests validating performance components working in concert:
- Connection pool: lifecycle, load (50 concurrent), exhaustion, eviction,
  timeout, metrics accuracy, stress (100 concurrent)
- Circuit breaker: state transitions, half-open recovery/reopen,
  failure counter reset, rapid cycling (50 cycles)
- Retry: first-attempt success, transient recovery, exhaustion,
  outcome tracking, circuit breaker integration, backoff timing
- Watchdog: healthy state, stale detection, grace period, report completeness
- Backpressure: tier classification (green/yellow/red/black),
  transitions, snapshots, disabled mode, zero-capacity safety,
  continuous ramp evaluation
- Cross-component: pool+retry, circuit+pool, watchdog+backpressure,
  concurrent acquire+evict

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
